title: cytisus mollis
intro: Cytisus mollis, also known as Downy broom or Broom Downy, is a flowering plant species in the pea family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Cytisus mollis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
